verification.note: The USD 1 million/year NRO repatriation cap (RBI 2012 notice, no cap on NRE), the Rs 5 lakh threshold above which a CA certificate is required, and the Form 15CA/15CB -> Form 145/146 renaming under the Income Tax Act 2025 (effective 1 April 2026) were checked against secondary tax-reference summaries, not the RBI/CBDT primary text directly - re-verify against incometaxindia.gov.in's own Form 145 FAQ or an RBI FEMA master direction before treating the exact rupee threshold as final.
